images.prompt: A cinematic, ultra-clean hero illustration for an open-source project named clawclawclaw, showing a private personal AI runtime as a glowing command center on a desk at night. Main subject: a terminal-first control interface with elegant panel composition, subtle lobster-inspired claw emblem integrated into the UI glass reflections, no literal text. Environment: modern self-hosted workstation, compact server node, soft ambient fog, deep depth of field. Lighting: teal and warm amber dual-light setup, controlled highlights, soft shadows, premium contrast. Composition: left side negative space for title overlay, wide 16:9 banner framing, polished but realistic digital painting style, high detail, clean edges, no watermark, no logo text, no gibberish.

A minimal yet powerful brand concept image for clawclawclaw: a stylized lobster-claw inspired emblem forged from brushed metal and translucent glass, floating over a dark matte surface with subtle circuit traces. Subject: single emblem object centered, elegant geometry, premium craftsmanship feel. Environment: abstract studio backdrop with shallow haze, no text, no letters. Lighting: dramatic rim light in cyan and soft orange bounce, micro-reflections showing precision and privacy-tech mood. Color: restrained palette, graphite black, steel silver, deep teal accents. Composition: centered 1:1 product-shot style, high-fidelity rendering, crisp contours, refined texture, no watermark, no typographic elements.

A technical concept illustration visualizing a modular private agent architecture. Subject: layered blocks and flowing data paths representing providers, channels, tools, memory, and runtime adapters, arranged as a clean systems map without words. Environment: semi-dark blueprint-like digital space with subtle particles and depth layers. Lighting: cool directional key light with warm secondary accents to create hierarchy and focus. Composition: isometric 4:3 scene, clear visual separation between modules, elegant motion trails indicating data flow, balanced negative space, premium engineering aesthetic, high clarity, no text labels, no watermark, no clutter.

An atmospheric terminal-first productivity scene for a personal private AI agent workflow. Subject: multiple dark-mode terminal panes with clean structured output blocks and subtle charts, viewed at a slight angle, with one central focus terminal glowing softly. Environment: quiet midnight workspace, mechanical keyboard, compact hardware node, cable management neat and intentional. Lighting: moody low-key cinematic light, cool blue ambient with warm practical desk lamp, volumetric glow. Composition: wide 16:9 cinematic framing with layered foreground and background for depth, modern editorial tech illustration style, highly detailed but uncluttered, no readable text, no watermark, no branding words.
